name: Split Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the split peas and soak them in water to cover for overnight.
2. In the morning, drain the soaking water and place the split peas in a pot with 3 quarts of fresh water.
3. Add the ham bone and minced onion to the pot.
4. Cook the soup until the peas are soft.
5. Strain the soup through a sieve to remove the solids.
6. Melt the butter in a separate pan, then stir in the flour until well blended and smooth.
7. Gradually add the salt, pepper, and milk to the flour mixture, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
8. Combine the thickened sauce with the strained pea liquid.
9. Cook the soup together until it reaches a desired thickness.
10. Serve hot.
